night.review: Dark-bodied subject that DEFEATS the line-color gate without being wrong: held lineW 51-105 through ~27 attempts of every lever (strict --line-white-min, low temperature, --dilate-lines 2, --notes) — commit d652c15. Do NOT burn attempts chasing the gate: render the simulated composite (lib/night-composite.mjs) early; the chalk owns the lines and the punch clears the fill's dark ink. Shipped with the dark-outline warning acknowledged after 2x-zoom composite review.
night.why: commits 7a9ca89 + d652c15; pipeline.md status-table lesson 'Dark-bodied subjects can defeat the line-color gate without being wrong'.
